LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshenGripGloves.label: forge ashen grip gloves
LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshenGripGloves.description: Assemble early abyssal work-gauntlets from steel knuckle plates, residue grip pads and crude ember conduits.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftConduitGloves.label: forge rift conduit gloves
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftConduitGloves.description: Build mid-tier conduit gloves around plasteel hand plates and a stabilized rift feedback lattice.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownsealGauntlets.label: forge crownseal gauntlets
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownsealGauntlets.description: Fold late-line gauntlets around a crown-seal lattice, spacer components and a crowned core fragment.
